name: What if employer sees my AI work injury chats in Dallas?

mainEntity.name: What if employer sees my AI work injury chats in Dallas?

acceptedAnswer.text: They'll use against—get comp lawyer now.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description:
Expect use in denial; no privilege.[1] TX comp broad discovery.

**Key factors:**
- Fault irrelevant comp.
- AI admits weaken.
- Retaliation protect.

Comp attorney fights; focus medical. Delete future.[1] File claim.
